ogTitle: Heathcote Junction vs Heatherton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Heathcote Junction and Heatherton.
heading: Heathcote Junction vs Heatherton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Heathcote Junction, Victoria and Heatherton, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Heatherton has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Heathcote Junction (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Heathcote Junction or Heatherton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Heathcote Junction has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Heatherton scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Heathcote Junction scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Heatherton scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Heathcote Junction or Heatherton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Heatherton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
